textByHashes.a3653ae9d174bc638228d723681abb27cd290017: I seek a hero to go on an important mission!
textByHashes.6d56691b07c53b1045e8948138d5000240adb423: I require the Staff of Armadyl. But if you wish to seek it for me, you must free up some inventory space so that I can give you what you need.
textByHashes.3e5a210b18cfb895b97de253bcabad7fe71a24c4: I require the Staff of Armadyl. It is in the deserted Temple of Ikov, near Hemenster, north east of here.
textByHashes.02a7ab5e84b03096ed56045649a8419b1f83fe24: Take care hero! There is a dangerous monster somewhere in the temple!
textByHashes.d19d975639bbbba724c0af63b7bf137feed29790: The guardians of the Staff of Armadyl fear me!
textByHashes.90e7911804203c694fd0692fffcd52c51ce3b0a2: They have set up a magical barrier which even my power cannot overcome!
textByHashes.022477cf2c2742cb0c3aafc926c4f073b25bbf31: It's not as easy as it sounds. The monster can only be killed with a weapon of ice. There are many other dangers.
textByHashes.ba940c67ad3958b77c5e8a44d0516fdae22ecf0f: I shall give you a pendant. Without it you will not be able to enter the Chamber of Fear.
textByHashes.1e3dbfd1b3d97a935b8811e8ce774c2cd55456bd: Here is my pendant. Now, I cannot stay here much longer. Meet me in my house, across the river south-east from Edgeville. It is next to the so-called Grand Exchange.
textByHashes.3930a93bd3b25441636dff0a879789887e22aeec: I see you are the mercenary type.
textByHashes.2c1945345eb6774fd115a2ca8d7ea94409c8fbf9: I will reward you well if you bring me the staff.
textByHashes.d2155804f857acde317d0119412e80b7a3d6c951: Wimp! Call yourself a hero?! My daughter is more of a hero than you!
textByHashes.f550e4a9cf9038117319c3654153f9613be386cd: I told you not to meet me here again! Soon I will go to my house, across the river south-east from Edgeville. It is next to the so-called Grand Exchange.
textByHashes.6bd9e1122ea399d7b3c3faca9007174154c1aa92: I need the Staff of Armadyl. It's in the Temple of Ikov, near Hemenster, north east of here.
textByHashes.98cdff0b914fc2494bd31bdbeff85a9d24d57b75: Have you got the Staff of Armadyl yet?
textByHashes.2e5be6d118bb628a2b503b2052cb5a997ca819d0: I can feel the power of the staff running through me! I will be more powerful and they shall bow down to me!
textByHashes.c58edc04c90f7ada6b0347ed02678b3d654a3b98: I suppose you want your reward? I shall grant you much power!
textByHashes.591373d0852b45a35b67320bfb04ef761b42e29f: You don't want to attack me. I am your friend.
textByHashes.6d97b76b12c8edf75402ed329b7ba2d0c8ee8aab: You have defeated me for now! I shall reappear in the North!
textByHashes.eb08ba349618a617bce9d48512d0e47b26734f81: You... Did you really think that disguise would fool me? You are not Surok... and you are not welcome!
textByHashes.eb950bf56f17c8dcf409c1a49be9136a2472518a: What wonderful devastation! Now, I have things to attend to.
textByHashes.613700d968a2ed7e45385f328d76b6c979b003ee: It seems you have found the Stone. Why was I not informed?
textByHashes.29d02b6c6a7634b587d06dfd024c79a99df5bad5: Silence! Do you not feel that, Movario? It calls to me... my birthright!
textByHashes.d14c25a9059349ed570e2ffd9ec8eada0c897051: Icthlarin... Zaros... Zamorak... All of them false! Finally the Mahjarrat shall take their rightful place as the sole inheritors of Gielinor, and I will be their god!
textByHashes.e88196676c16a491b4b792efefd93636f3743ba4: Any who stand in my way shall be swept away like the civilisations of old. For those that are lucky, their children shall become slaves!
textByHashes.d78cedfcc12ea9e3d05c51abedb9630d0f7f763d: Ah, , I see you have decided to interfere once again. Commendable, but meaningless. You cannot stop what is to come. Death is all that awaits you if you try.
textByHashes.7854c94afc502f94af119f40f1cf357c0cbf4b20: Such arrogance. Do you not realise who you address? I am Lord Lucien of the Mahjarrat, Master of the Thousand Curses. Look upon my works and despair!
textByHashes.1e76d516730ee5c5bd237cb830072c966c93cf68: Are you truly so misguided that you cannot see the truth before you? I hold both the Staff of Armadyl and the Stone of Jas!
textByHashes.b31bf3a0b0c12949b67dbab3d524c61e872d7115: Not since Zamorak himself has anyone possessed this much power! Nothing will stop me following in his footsteps!
textByHashes.57d3598f1a6b586b55fd206735717c38c73a8c3d: He doesn't have a choice. He no longer has any power here. His days are already done.
textByHashes.c0d07329615cdbd54f04878deddb9edce73b6e8a: Now, this conversation bores me. My ascension approaches, and I only have room for the strongest as my worshippers. Those too weak to slay even these lowly beasts will certainly not be wanted!
textByHashes.464bb7941cb566fa648f3c900dc87ac97f654d56: You can not kill me human!
textByHashes.8ee228e6639fc3464f4709724958a4d44cfb9ae9: Have another, it will remind you of my power!
